sentence: 这部电影的叙事方式很独特。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng de xùshì fāngshì hěn dútè.
english: This film's narrative style is very unique.

sentence: 医生每年给他做例行检查。
pinyin: Yīshēng měi nián gěi tā zuò lìxíng jiǎnchá.
english: The doctor gives him a routine check-up every year.

sentence: 她每晚看一小时电视节目。
pinyin: Tā měi wǎn kàn yī xiǎoshí diànshì jiémù.
english: She watches TV programs for one hour every evening.

sentence: 他把微信头像换成了宝宝的照片。
pinyin: Tā bǎ Wēixìn tóuxiàng huànchéng le bǎobao de zhàopiàn.
english: He changed his WeChat profile picture to a photo of his baby.

sentence: 她的成绩一直在班里前列。
pinyin: Tā de chéngjì yīzhí zài bān lǐ qiánliè.
english: Her grades have always been among the top in the class.
